title_text=”cosmos-power-2-logo-small” _builder_version=”4.19.0″ _module_preset=”default” custom_margin=”||19px||false|false” global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_image][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” custom_margin=”||14px|||” hover_enabled=”0″ global_colors_info=”{}” sticky_enabled=”0″]COSMOS POWER 2 is our dedicated intermediate PPG.

Pure PPG fun.

Version 2 delivers a wider speed range and even more playful handling. Like its predecessor, it’s an efficient, stable, nimble wing that’s a joy to fly. Thanks to our reflex-efficient profile, it offers exceptional pitch stability and solidity. Real-world tests show unprecedented fuel efficiency at both low and high speeds. It’s a wing that’s perfect for long-distance adventures yet still lively and playful for local flying.

FEATURES:

  • Shark nose reflex profile
  • Roller Cam 2 trimmers buckles
  • Increased solidy
  • Higher top speed
  • 2D steering by defalt
  • Lightweight yet durable materials

Designed primarily as a dedicated paramotor glider, the Cosmos Power2 is equally at home in free-flight, delivering a smooth, enjoyable experience across disciplines.

Thanks to its “Efficient Full Reflex” profile and low-drag line plan, it offers outstanding pitch stability and remarkable efficiency. Its newly developed airfoil, combined with advanced design features, sets a new benchmark in paramotor glider performance, perfectly balancing fuel efficiency, stability, and speed.

We call it “efficient” because traditional full-reflex profiles are not known for efficiency. By integrating key elements from our high-performance free-flying gliders, we have created a full-reflex paramotor wing that excels in both efficiency and stability. The result is an airfoil that delivers exceptional pitch stability, comparable to conventional full-reflex wings, while dramatically improving efficiency—even at high angles of attack and maximum speeds.

In short, the Cosmos Power2 is a responsive glider that inflates and launches easily in both light and strong winds. Whether cruising at trim or flying fully accelerated, pilots will enjoy mproved stability at all speeds. With trimmers, speed bar, and tip steering, exploring the wing’s full performance range is intuitive and straightforward. The Cosmos Power2 is also highly roll-stable, with no unwanted oscillations, and its excellent energy retention ensures smooth, predictable landings with a strong, reassuring flare.[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ module_id=”technical-data” _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” background_enable_color=”off” background_enable_video_mp4=”off” custom_padding=”30px||32px||false|false” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row use_custom_gutter=”on” gutter_width=”2″ make_equal=”on” _builder_version=”4.17.4″ _module_preset=”default” background_color=”#000000″ width_tablet=”90%” width_phone=”90%” width_last_edited=”off|desktop” max_width=”1110px” custom_padding=”15px|21px|6px|21px|false|true” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.17.4″ _module_preset=”default” background_color=”RGBA(0,0,0,0)” background_enable_image=”off” animation_direction=”right” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” header_font=”Oswald|600||on|||||” header_text_align=”center” header_text_color=”#FFFFFF” header_line_height=”1.3em” header_3_font=”Gruppo|700|||||||” header_3_text_align=”left” header_3_text_color=”#FFFFFF” header_3_font_size=”17px” header_4_font=”Oswald|700||on|||||” header_4_text_align=”center” header_4_text_color=”#171a25″ header_4_font_size=”40px” header_4_letter_spacing=”-0.2px” background_enable_color=”off” module_alignment=”center” header_4_font_size_tablet=”” header_4_font_size_phone=”30px” header_4_font_size_last_edited=”on|phone” global_colors_info=”{}”]

RISER

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row use_custom_gutter=”on” gutter_width=”2″ make_equal=”on” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” max_width=”1110px” custom_padding=”30px||0px||false|false” hover_enabled=”0″ locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}” column_structure=”3_5,2_5″ sticky_enabled=”0″][et_pb_column type=”3_5″ _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” custom_margin=”||14px|||” hover_enabled=”0″ global_colors_info=”{}” sticky_enabled=”0″ locked=”off”]

The risers on the Cosmos Power2 feature:

  • Colour coded “A” riser
  • Long travel “Rollercam”trimmers
  • Speed system
  • Two brake handle magnets attachment points for optimized geometry when flying paramotors with a low, mid or high hang point.
  • Mini toggle for tip steering that can be converted to 2D steering
  • Main brake handle.

The Cosmos Power2 delivers exceptional efficiency across the entire speed range. Its optimized aerofoil geometry works in perfect synergy with the riser system, setting a new benchmark for reflex paramotor wings.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”2_5″ _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_image src=”https://www.flowparagliders.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/Risers-1.jpg” title_text=”Risers (1)” align=”center” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” custom_margin=”0px||0px||false|false” hover_enabled=”0″ global_colors_info=”{}” sticky_enabled=”0″][/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ module_id=”features” _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” custom_padding=”0px||17px||false|false” border_color_top=”#2B59C0″ border_color_bottom=”#2b59c0″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row use_custom_gutter=”on” gutter_width=”2″ make_equal=”on” module_id=”colours” _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” max_width=”1110px” custom_padding=”50px||0px|||” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” header_font=”Oswald|600||on|||||” header_text_align=”center” header_text_color=”#FFFFFF” header_line_height=”1.3em” header_3_font=”Gruppo|700|||||||” header_3_text_align=”left” header_3_text_color=”#FFFFFF” header_3_font_size=”17px” header_4_font=”Oswald|700||on|||||” header_4_text_align=”center” header_4_text_color=”#171a25″ header_4_font_size=”40px” header_4_letter_spacing=”-0.2px” background_color=”#000000″ module_alignment=”center” custom_padding=”14px||5px|20px|false|false” header_4_font_size_tablet=”” header_4_font_size_phone=”30px” header_4_font_size_last_edited=”on|phone” global_colors_info=”{}”]

excerpt.rendered: COSMOS POWER 2 is our dedicated intermediate PPG. Pure PPG fun. Version 2 delivers a wider speed range and even more playful handling. Like its predecessor, it’s an efficient, stable, nimble wing that’s a joy to fly. Thanks to our reflex-efficient profile, it offers exceptional pitch stability and solidity. Real-world tests show unprecedented fuel efficiency […]
